酒の席を通し、鬼ヶ島を訪れた人間たちはすっかり鬼族と打ち解け、<br>宴会は大い:
Through food and drink, the humans had fully opened up to the
oni-folk, and the banquet was in full swing. But——
……っ！？ な、なんですか、今のは……？<br>何か、妙な感覚……魔力の波のよう:
...!? Wh-what was that...?
Something odd... like a wave of magical energy just passed...?
ああ。今のは、クリスタルの力だ。どうやら、アーデルハイト君が<br>作ってくれた:
Yes. That was the crystal's power. It seems the crystal has been
freed from the box that Adelheid-kun made for us.
そんな！？ あれは私の部屋に置いておいたはず……。<br>鬼族の誰かが勝手に入る:
That can't be! I left it in my room...
None of the oni-folk would go in without permission...
となると……何者かが鬼ヶ島に侵入したのかもしれないな。<br>しかし……今の状況:
That means someone may have broken into Oni Island.
If the crystal activated now, in this situation... very bad.
い、いや、もっと変な感じだったぞ……！: N-no, it felt weirder than that...!
どうやら村人たちも感じたみたいだな。<br>あれだけ強い波動なのだから、無理もな:
The villagers felt it too, it seems. With a pulse that strong,
that's hardly surprising.
み、みなさん、落ち着いてくださ～い。<br>ただいま、状況を確認しますから――:
E-everyone, please stay calm~. We're checking on the situation right
now——
クレハが村人たちを落ち着かせようとしたその時、<br>突如として、怪しい風体の男:
Just as Kureha tried to calm the villagers, a suspicious-looking man
suddenly burst through the door and crashed in!
ちっ、しつこいやつらめ……！<br>ここは……宴会場かっ？: Tch, persistent bunch...! Is this... a banquet hall?
お前は……あの時の盗賊か！<br>そうか、クリスタルを奪ったのはお前だな！:
You're... the thief from before!
So you're the one who stole the crystal!
ははっ、誰かと思えば、間抜けな司令官さんかよ！<br>そんなもん盗まれるほうが悪:
Hah, look who it is — the dumbass Commander!
If you get robbed it's your own fault! That crystal is mine——!
待ちやがれぇぇぇっ！！<br>何さらしとんじゃわれぇぇぇっ！！: Hold it right there!!!! What do you think you're doing!!!!
ぐぅっ……！？ ぬ、抜け出せねえ……！<br>ちくしょう、馬鹿力が……！: Ugh...!? I-I can't get free...! Damn, the brute strength...!
な、なんだ！？<br>いったい何が起きてるんだ……！？: Wh-what!? What on earth is happening...!?
村人たちの間に混乱が広がる中、<br>盗賊の手から零れ落ちたクリスタルが地面に転:
As panic spread among the villagers,
the crystal slipped from the thief's hand and rolled across the floor.
クリスタルが光っている……完全に起動しているな。<br>盗賊が注いだ魔力が原因か:
The crystal is glowing... fully activated. Did the thief's
magic cause it? No... the reaction is too strong for that.
ふむ……確かに、この反応は妙だぞ。<br>モンスターを引き寄せる力を発揮し続けて:
Mm... indeed, this reaction is strange.
It's continuously putting out the force that draws monsters.
そこの盗賊君。ひとつ教えてもらいたいんだが、<br>このクリスタルが入っていた箱:
You there, thief-kun. I have one question for you —
what happened to the box this crystal was in?
おらぁ！ 姐さんの質問におとなしく答えやがれ！: Answer the lady's question like a good boy, ya hear!
へっ、へへっ……！ そんなもん、壊してやったよ！<br>邪魔だったからなぁ！: Heh, heh heh...! I smashed it! It was in my way!
やはりそうか……。<br>司令官君、少々、困ったことになったぞ。: As I suspected... Commander-kun, we have a bit of a problem.
クリスタルは誰かが魔力を注がなくても、モンスターを引き寄せる波動を<br>発して:
The crystal emits a monster-drawing pulse on its own —
the box was simply containing that while it was sealed inside.
これがどういうことか、わかるかい？: Do you understand what that means?
……密閉状態の箱に込められている間に蓄積された力が<br>一気に解き放たれて、波:
...The power that built up while it was sealed in the box
was released all at once, and it keeps sending out the pulse——?
正解だ。つまり――このままではモンスターが絶えずこの鬼ヶ島に押し寄せる。<br>:
Correct. If left as is, monsters will swarm here without end.
And in greater numbers than ever before.
……おい、そこの盗賊。大変なことをしてくれたな？: ...Hey, you. Thief. You've done something quite terrible.
へへっ、知ったことかよ。<br>それよりも心配すべきことがあるんじゃねぇのか？:
Heh, not my problem. Don't you have bigger things to worry about
right now?
おい、てめぇら！ 今からここにモンスターが押し寄せるぞ！<br>鬼族のやつらは、:
Hey, you lot! Monsters are about to swarm this place!
The oni-folk lured them here to slaughter every last one of you!
なっ……！？ なんてでたらめを……！: Wha...!? What a pack of lies...!
モ、モンスターが……？<br>い、いや、でも彼らは、おれたちに親切にしてくれて…: M-monsters...? N-no, but they were so kind to us...
そんなもん、騙すために決まってんだろ！<br>鬼ヶ島に招待して、人間たちを一網打:
Obviously to trick you! They invited you to Oni Island
so they could wipe out every last human in one sweep!
アンタ、ふざけたこといってんじゃないよ！<br>ちょっと黙ってな……！！: Don't you dare say that! Shut your mouth for a second...!!
殴って気絶させた……？<br>言われたらマズいことだから、口をふさいだのか……？:
She knocked him out...? Did she silence him because
there was something he shouldn't have said...?
なっ、なんだって！？ あたいにそんな気はないよ！<br>ただこいつが、ふざけたこ:
Wh-what!? I don't have any such intentions!
I just hit him because he was saying such outrageous things...!
（マズいッ。村人たちは、この盗賊が原因を作ったとは知らない。<br>それにこの混:
(This is bad. The villagers don't know the thief caused this.
And in all this chaos, calm reasoning won't...!)
こ、殺される……！ おれたちは罠にはめられたんだ！<br>やっぱり鬼族は恐ろしい:
We-we're going to be killed...! We were lured into a trap!
I knew the oni-folk were a fearsome clan...!
ち、違います！ 聞いてください！<br>私たちは、みなさんと本当に仲良くなりたく:
Th-that's not it! Please listen!
We genuinely want to be friends with all of you...!
緊急事態だっ！ モンスターたちの群れが迫ってやがる！<br>戦えるやつは構えろ！:
Emergency! A horde of monsters is approaching!
Anyone who can fight, take position!
モンスター！？ その人の言ってたことは本当だったんだ！<br>やっぱり鬼族はおれ:
Monsters!? So what that man said was true!
The oni-folk really are trying to kill us...!
はぁっ！？ なんでそうなるんだい！？<br>あたいらはあんたたちを守ろうと……！:
What!? How did you reach that conclusion!?
We're trying to protect you...!
だ、騙されるもんか！ い、今っ、モンスターの声が聞こえたぞ！<br>囲まれてる…:
W-we won't be fooled! I-I can hear the monsters now!
We're surrounded...!? Th-there's no escape...!
だめ……こんなに混乱していたら、避難させることもできない……！<br>いったい、:
No good... with everyone in this panic, we can't even
evacuate them...! What on earth can we do...?
<size=48>くっくっく……まんまと騙されたなぁ、馬鹿な人間どもぉ！！</>: <size=48>Heh heh... fell right into our trap, you foolish humans!!</>
えっ……！？ だ、旦那様！？<br>いったい何を……！？: Wha...!? D-darling!? What are you doing...!?
ああ、そうだ！ 最初からお前たちを騙していたんだよ！<br>逃げ遅れたやつから食:
That's right! We've been deceiving you from the start!
We'll eat whoever's slowest to escape! WOOOOOOOOOO!
<user>に追い立てられ、<br>村人たちは一カ所へと追い込まれていく。: Herded by %user%, the villagers were driven together into one spot.
よくやった。えらいぞ、司令官君。<br>あとでなでなでしてあげよう。:
Well done. Good job, Commander-kun.
I'll give you a good pat-pat later.
……っ！ なるほど！ 旦那様は村人たちを一カ所に集めて守るため、<br>わざと脅:
...! I see! My darling threatened them on purpose to gather
the villagers for protection! Incredible! As expected!
嘘も方便だ。死なれたら、あとで誤解を解くこともできなくなるだろう？<br>だから:
The ends justify the means. If they die, we can never clear up the
misunderstanding. So right now — we protect every last one of them!
はいっ！ 鬼族のみなさん、聞いていましたね！？<br>旦那様の指示にしたがって、:
Yes! Everyone, did you hear that!?
Follow my darling's orders and protect the humans!
ああ！ 司令官の旦那！<br>クレハお嬢の花婿に相応しいところ、見せておくれ！:
Yeah! Commander! Show us you're worthy of being Miss Kureha's
groom!
誰が花婿だ！<br>いや、今はそんなことを言ってる場合じゃないか！: Who's a groom! — no, this isn't the time for that!
鬼族は人間たちを守れるように、壁を作れ！: Oni-folk, form a wall to shield the humans!
おうっ、任せろ！ やってやるぜぇーーー！: Got it, leave it to us! Let's gooo——!
クレハは腕利きを何人か連れて遊撃に出ろ！ 判断は任せる！:
Kureha, take a few skilled fighters and mount a sortie!
The judgment calls are yours!
承知しました！ このクレハ、お役目果たしてみせます！: Understood! This Kureha will fulfill her duty!
シラエス！ 俺が残りの鬼族たちを指揮して、モンスターを一箇所に追い込む！<br>:
Shiraes! I'll command the oni-folk and drive the monsters
to one spot! On my signal, unleash everything! Can you do it!?
いいだろう。せっかく今日はお客さんがたくさんいるんだ。<br>とっておきの花火を:
Very well. We have so many guests here today.
Let me give them a special fireworks show.
頼りにしてるぞ！ さあ、みんな正念場だ！<br>鬼族の強さ、俺に見せてくれ――！:
I'm counting on you! Alright, this is the moment of truth!
Show me the oni-folk's true strength——!
